scripts.build: echo 'Building native binary for nodejs' && cd native && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/copy-wrappers.mjs
scripts.graph: echo 'Building Graph data' && node node/cli.mjs graph
scripts.ingest: echo 'Ingesting graph data into DB' && node node/cli.mjs db-ingest
scripts.rag: echo 'Performing RAG search on DB' && node node/cli.mjs db-rag
scripts.traverse: echo 'Traversing the graph' && node node/cli.mjs db-traverse
